DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post Judgt Disco & For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $200, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
